seoTitle: Dedin vs Deebing Heights — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Dedin and Deebing Heights. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogTitle: Dedin vs Deebing Heights: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Dedin and Deebing Heights.
heading: Dedin vs Deebing Heights — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Dedin, Queensland and Deebing Heights, Queensland. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Dedin has a lower overall climate risk score (36/100) compared to Deebing Heights (45/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Dedin or Deebing Heights safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Dedin has a flood risk score of 42/100, while Deebing Heights scores 47/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Dedin scores 49/100 for bushfire risk. Deebing Heights scores 52/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Dedin or Deebing Heights?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Dedin has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 2.2% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
